All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

D

Damage() - Method in record class org.sim.fish.genes.Genes
Returns the value of the Damage record component.
DAMAGE_COST_MODIFIER - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
DAMAGE_MUTATION_WEIGHT - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
DEEP_BIOME_COLOR - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
DEEP_BIOME_ENERGY_MAX - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
DEEP_BIOME_PLANT_ENERGY - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
DEEP_BIOME_UPPER_BORDER - Static variable in class org.sim.Consts
 
DespawnEntity(Entity) - Static method in class org.sim.SimManager
Safely queues an existing entity to be removed from the simulation world (for example, when a plant is eaten or a fish decays), removing it from the simulation.
Die() - Method in class org.sim.Entity
Changes the status of the entity to dead and triggers its removal from the simulation.
Die() - Method in class org.sim.fish.Fish
Handles the fish death sequence by removing it and spawning a piece of meat in its place.
Die() - Method in class org.sim.food.Plant
Destroys the plant and notifies the parent biome to allow new plants to grow.
dispose() - Method in class org.sim.Processing
Exports simulation data when the window is closed.
DistTolerance - Static variable in class org.sim.Entity
 
draw() - Method in class org.sim.Processing
The core rendering loop executed automatically by the Processing engine.
draw_biomes(List<Biome>) - Method in class org.sim.Processing
Draws the background biomes (water depth layers) on the screen using their specific boundary heights and colors.
draw_entities(List<Entity>) - Method in class org.sim.Processing
Renders all active simulation objects (including fish, plants, eggs, and meat) at their current positions on the screen.
draw_info(int) - Method in class org.sim.Processing
Draws text statistics and general simulation information, such as the current population of fish, on the user interface.
